markets.no_sub_title: Richarlison
markets.rules_primary: If Richarlison records the first goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Tottenham vs Liverpool professional EPL soccer game originally scheduled for Mar 15, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Tottenham vs Liverpool professional EPL soccer game originally scheduled for Mar 15, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored.
